name: SSR MINING INC.
business: SSR Mining Inc. is a precious metals mining company that produces gold dor as well as copper, silver, lead and zinc concentrates. The company sells gold dor produced at its Marigold, CC&V and Seabee operations primarily to banks, and previously sold gold dor from its pler operation to the Central Bank of Türkiye. Its Puna operation produces silver, lead and zinc concentrates sold to smelters or traders for further refining.

exposures.sentence: The Company produces gold dor as well as copper, silver, lead and zinc concentrates.
